## Description

Provide a summary of the changes and the user/developer experience value this PR brings. Link any related issues here.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New component or feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (`pnpm format` and `pnpm lint` pass).
- [ ] I have run local test suites (`pnpm test` passes).
- [ ] I have verified accessibility (axe-core / keyboard navigation).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] My changes do not break dark mode layout or mobile responsiveness.
